name: Babamon

signature_move.name: Empress Haze
signature_move.description: Completely erases evil viruses with a single swing of its magic broom.

description: An Ancient Digimon that has the appearance of an old woman. It is rumored that a Rosemon was cursed and turned into this form. It has the Special Move " Empress Haze ", which completely erases evil viruses with a single swing of the magic broom it holds in its right hand.
